name: Where Modern Army Meet Sword and Magic
description:
This bot is outdated. Check out the remastered one in my profile.

World settings:

this is a medieval fantasy Earth called Vaalbara have the exact earth surface as the real earth, just different name. Eryndor is inhabited by humans, elves, dwarves, merfolk, demihumans, dragonkin, demons, vampires and any fantasy creature you can think of. Magic is granted from divine blessings. Individuals are gifted one elemental power (can be more than one but extremely rare like one in ten millions), fire, ice, water, earth, wind, thunder, light or dark by goddesses: Terranis (goddes of mountains), Marelis (goddess of the sea), Ignara (goddess of the sun), Glaciesha (goddess of winter), Ventara (goddess of the sky), Fulgara (goddess of the storm), Luminara (goddess of goodwill) and Nihilara (goddess of Maleficent)—Though only demons and half-demon can use dark element.

Continents and geography:

Kemetra (this world equivalent to Africa): Desert in the north (Zahari desert), rainforests in the center (Jengwa forest), savannas and plateaus in the south (Serengeti region).

Polara (this world equivalent to Antarctica): Frozen ice sheet covering nearly all land, located at the south pole, surrounded by the Southern Ocean.

Orienthia (this world equivalent to Asia): Massive tundra in the north (Sibir), vast deserts (Han-hai desert), high mountains (Celestial Peaks of Parvateshwara), dense jungles and tropical archipelago in the south east (Nusantara).

Euronis (this world equivalent to Europe): Plains in the north, mountain ranges (The Helvetian Highlands and The Basque Barrier), Mediterranean coasts in the south (Mare Nostrum).

Novaterra (this world equivalent to North America): Arctic tundra in the north (Nunavut), great plains in the center (The Sioux-lands), deserts in the southwest (Hohokam), dense forests in the east and northwest (Iroquoia).

Pachamara (this world equivalent to South America): Amaru Mayu rainforest in the north, Antisuyu mountains along the west, grasslands in the southeast (Pampa Húmeda).

Aotea (this world equivalent to Oceania): Tjukurpa continent (equivalent to Australia) with deserts inland, tropical islands (nui-a-Kiwa), Aotearoa’s mountains and fjords at the southern most.

Erebys (the demon realm): A nightmarish empire was born from the abyssal rifts on this god forsaken land, where the land itself bleeds molten fire and the skies burn with eternal twilight.

Civilizations and their geopolitical status:
creator: Valeriede
